pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description instructions.
Explicitly defined in the task description and validated mathematically using the standard Delta to Wye conversion formulas: R1=(30*90)/180=15, R2=(30*60)/180=10, R3=(60*90)/180=30.
Explicitly defined in the task description instructions.
Explicitly defined in the setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing a Delta to Star conversion using the 'com.hsn.electricalcalculations' app. The target input values are 30, 60, and 90 Ohms. The expected output Star (Wye) resistance values are 15, 10, and 30 Ohms, which correctly match the mathematical calculation for these inputs.
